title: Dual Arc Border Flow Curves
description: Every option uses the same white dual-arc border flow. Only the motion curve and rhythm differ.

materialStandard.title: Material Standard
materialStandard.summary: Material's common ease-in-out curve: quick acceleration followed by slow deceleration.

materialAcceleration.title: Material Acceleration
materialAcceleration.summary: Starts slower and speeds up later, matching the requested slow-then-fast rhythm.

carbonProductive.title: Carbon Productive
carbonProductive.summary: IBM Carbon's productive curve: restrained, efficient, and less visually loud.

carbonExpressive.title: Carbon Expressive
carbonExpressive.summary: IBM Carbon's expressive curve: more rhythmic while avoiding bounce or sudden stops.
